interface.designer: Where you drag buttons and labels to design the screen.
interface.blocks: Where you program the behavior using logic blocks.

technical_constraints.components: Non-visible components like TextToSpeech or TinyDB are essential for advanced features.
technical_constraints.ai_companion: The best way to test your app in real-time on a phone.

tips: Use 'HorizontalArrangement' to put two buttons side by side.
TinyDB is perfect for saving high scores even when the app is closed.
